name: Lorem Ipsum File Statistics Workflow
description: Generate a 5-paragraph lorem ipsum text file, then count and report word and sentence statistics

tasks.name: Generate Lorem Ipsum File
tasks.description: You MUST call python_exec to generate exactly 5 paragraphs of lorem ipsum text. Use Python's random/string libraries or hardcode sample paragraphs. Then you MUST call file_write to save the generated text to a file named 'lorem_ipsum.txt'. Output the complete file path where it was saved.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains a file path ending in 'lorem_ipsum.txt' and confirms file was written

tasks.name: Read Lorem Ipsum File
tasks.description: You MUST call file_read to read the file at the path specified in task_001's output. Output the FULL file contents verbatim. Do NOT summarize as 'file was read' — downstream tasks need the actual text to count words and sentences.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains the complete lorem ipsum text with 5 paragraphs

tasks.name: Count Words and Sentences
tasks.description: You MUST call python_exec to count the total number of words and sentences in the text from task_002's output. Count words by splitting on whitespace. Count sentences by counting periods, exclamation marks, and question marks. Output format: JSON object with keys 'total_words' and 'total_sentences' containing integer values. Example: {"total_words": 250, "total_sentences": 15}
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains a JSON object with 'total_words' and 'total_sentences' keys, both with positive integer values

tasks.name: Display Statistics
tasks.description: Format and display the statistics from task_003's output in a clear, human-readable format. Include both the total word count and total sentence count. Use the EXACT numbers from task_003 — do NOT invent or estimate values. Example format: 'Statistics for lorem_ipsum.txt: Total words: 250, Total sentences: 15'
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains formatted statistics with both word count and sentence count from task_003

metadata.goal: Create a text file with a 5-paragraph lorem ipsum placeholder. Then read the file, count the total number of words and sentences, and print the statistics.
